api_responses.body:
Price Match Policy

If you have a lower quote from a competitor for the same product and specifications, email us the quote and we will do our best to match the price for you. Make sure you include tax and shipping in your quote.

Need structural design, inserts, or more options? Request a quote

Request Your Quote

Our packaging experts are ready to custom tailor a solution for your business. Whether starting from scratch with structural design or getting a quote to print your custom dieline, the Packola team is here to help.

    <title>Custom Boxes & Custom Packaging | Design your own boxes | Packlane</title>

    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://s1-ecp.packola.com/static/assets/css_min/global-styles/global-styles.min.css?v=1772590484129">
    <link rel="stylesheet" media="(max-width: 991px)" href="https://s1-ecp.packola.com/static/assets/css_min/global-styles/global-styles-mobile.min.css?v=1772590484129">
    <link rel="stylesheet" media="screen and (-ms-high-contrast: active), screen and (-ms-high-contrast: none)"
            href="https://s1-ecp.packola.com/static/assets/css_min/global-styles/global-styles-ie.min.css?v=1772590484129">
    <link rel="stylesheet" property="stylesheet" href="/assets/css_min/page-quote-calc/page-quote-calc.min.css?v=1772590484129"/>
    <link rel="stylesheet" property="stylesheet" media="(max-width: 991px)"
            href="/assets/css_min/page-quote-calc/page-quote-calc-mobile.min.css?v=1772590484129"/>
    <script src="/assets/libraries/headjs/1.0.3/head.js"></script>
    <script>
        head.load(
            {angularJS: "/assets/libraries/angular/1.5.11/angular.min.js" },
            {angularSanitize: "/assets/libraries/angular-sanitize/1.6.1/angular-sanitize.min.js" },

        );

        fetch('/quote-calc-config.json?v=1772590484129')
            .then(function (response) {
                if (!response.ok) {
                    throw new Error('Could not load config file!');
                }
                return response.json();
            })
            .then(function (env) {
                window.website_config = env;
                head.ready(['angularJS', 'angularSanitize'], function(){
                    head.load(
                        {smsQuoteCalc :"/quote-calc.min.js?v=1772590484129" },
                    );
                    head.ready(['smsQuoteCalc'] , function() {
                        // Now bootstrap AngularJS manually
                        angular.bootstrap(document.body, ['SiteApp']);

                    });
                });
            })
            .catch(function (error) {
                console.error('Error loading environment config:', error);
            });

    </script>

</head>
